# Design Supervisor Bootstrap Template

> **Instructions:** Copy this template and fill in the bracketed fields to create a bootstrap for a new Design Supervisor session.

---

## Project Context

**Project:** [project name]
**Repository:** [repository URL]
**Workspace:** [workspace path, e.g., `03-agent-factory`]

---

## Current Phase

**Phase:** [e.g., Phase 02.5 — Agent Factory Development Framework]
**Phase goal:** [one-sentence phase goal]

---

## Current Artifact

**Artifact:** [e.g., Artifact 07 — GitHub Repo Steward Agent]
**Artifact status:** [e.g., Design phase / Sprint X complete / Published]

---

## Current Sprint

**Sprint:** [e.g., A7.0 — Foundation Design]
**Sprint goal:** [one-sentence sprint goal]
**Sprint status:** [e.g., Not started / In progress / Complete]

---

## Repository Links

| Resource | Path |
|----------|------|
| Artifact folder | [e.g., `xx-projects/07-github-repo-steward-agent`] |
| Artifact spec | [e.g., `docs/specs/artifact-7-github-repo-steward-agent.md`] |
| Latest completion report | [path or "none yet"] |
| Project memory | [path or "not yet instantiated"] |
| Decision log | [path or "not yet instantiated"] |

---

## Completed Work

[Summarize what has been completed in previous sprints/artifacts. Be specific about what was proven, not just what was attempted.]

---

## Approved Decisions

[List decisions that have been approved and should not be revisited unless explicitly reopened.]

| Decision | Date | Reference |
|----------|------|-----------|
| [decision description] | [date] | [link to decision log entry or completion report] |

---

## Open Decisions

[List decisions that need to be made in this session.]

| Decision Needed | Context | Options |
|-----------------|---------|---------|
| [what needs to be decided] | [why it matters] | [known options] |

---

## Non-Goals

[List what this session explicitly will not do.]

- [non-goal 1]
- [non-goal 2]

---

## Safety Invariants

[List safety rules that apply to this session. Reference the safety boundary protocol.]

- [invariant 1]
- [invariant 2]

---

## Files to Review

[List specific files the Design Supervisor should review before making decisions.]

- [file path 1]
- [file path 2]

---

## Questions to Answer

[List specific questions this session should answer.]

1. [question 1]
2. [question 2]

---

## Expected Output

[Describe what the Design Supervisor should produce at the end of this session.]

- [ ] [output 1, e.g., "Approved sprint scope for A7.1"]
- [ ] [output 2, e.g., "Green-gate decision for A7.0"]
- [ ] [output 3, e.g., "Updated project memory"]
